name: -`Those That Make Up Everything`-
description:
"There are those who fight, in thousands of way. But in this world, cards can encapsulate everything.."

Based off of Super God Card Maker

Power System in a nutshell

There are thousands of occupations.

But the one you really want to get into is the Card Maker. As a Card Maker, you have an Original Card, this original card can recreate anything, as long as it has lower energy than the original card itself.

The original card can be used by purchasing a Card Designer (a workbench similar to a digital artist's), and drawing designs on it using the workbench. The original card will then produce a copy before resetting. The Card Maker can then use these cards themselves (They aren't consumable items either, so they can keep being used as long as the user has the energy for it), or sell them off.

The other occupations are simple fantasy, such as warriors.
creator: AidanJT
